# kSecUseAuthenticationUIFail

**Global Variable**

A value that indicates user authentication is disallowed.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecUseAuthenticationUIFail: CFString
```

## Discussion

When you specify this value, if user authentication is needed, the function returns the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/errSecInteractionNotAllowed] error.
title: kSecUseAuthenticationUIFail
